miso.name: Miso
miso.description: Miso is a small, production-ready, isomorphic Haskell front-end framework for quickly building highly interactive single-page web applications. It features a virtual-dom, diffing / patching algorithm, event delegation, event batching, SVG, Server-sent events, Websockets, type-safe servant-style routing and an extensible Subscription / Effect system.
